summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PRA-GATI trading app. All backend APIs working perfectly (17/17 tests passed). Frontend navigation and core functionality working correctly. Minor UI state issues with scanner button during loading state.

ui_bugs.issue: Button becomes disabled during scanning operation and may remain in 'SCANNING...' state

passed_tests: Backend health endpoint returns status 'ok' with data_provider and demo_mode
Backend universe endpoint returns 206 symbols correctly
Backend signals endpoint returns proper signal data with indicator values
Backend ranked signals endpoint returns ranked signals with scores
Backend debug status endpoint returns engine status and route health
Backend debug RELIANCE endpoint returns indicator data correctly
Backend debug RELIANCE summary endpoint returns analysis summary
Backend config endpoint returns configuration without secrets
Backend run endpoint triggers signal engine execution successfully
Backend scan endpoint returns scan results with proper structure
Frontend Dashboard page loads with stats cards and PRA-GATI branding
Frontend Live Signals page shows signal table with search and filter functionality
Frontend Ranked page shows ranked opportunities with proper messaging
Frontend Charts page displays symbol data with EMA, RSI, ADX values
Frontend Universe page shows 206 symbols with search functionality
Frontend Debug Tool page works with ANALYZE button for RELIANCE symbol
Frontend Settings page shows configuration details
Navigation between all 8 pages works correctly
Engine status indicator shows ONLINE status
RUN_ENGINE functionality from sidebar and dashboard works
All search and filter functionalities work properly
